notes:

title: Topps Total Football®
notes: Includes bug fixes, feature updates and performance improvements.

title: Dream League Soccer 2026
notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.

title: Toy Blast
notes:
An update to play with family!

Who's brave enough to watch until the end? The toy family has settled in for a scary movie night, complete with blankets, snacks, and a few jumpscares. Join them for this spooky update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!

title: Solitaire Associations Journey
notes:
Hey there! A new update has arrived!

We are ready to make your game experience even greater. 

Bugs have been fixed and game performance optimized.

title: BitLife - Life Simulator
notes: What's up, Bitizens! Are you ready for the ULTIMATE summer showdown? We've got some updates coming your way that are going to be FIRE. But first, while we're getting them all ready, we've got a round of bug fixes and maintenance. Get excited and head over to our social channels to learn more. While you're there, drop us a screenshot of your favorite BitLife moment from this past week!

title: Angry Birds 2
notes: Minor bug fixes. Bugs: the only thing that (almost) makes us angrier than the piggies.
